ticket.subject: Cannot update email address
ticket.description: When I try to update my email address in the account settings, I get an error saying 'Email already in use'. But this is my new email address.

ticket.subject: Refund pending for 14 days
ticket.description: I requested a refund on my subscription 14 days ago and was told it would take 5-7 business days. Still waiting for the money to appear in my account.

ticket.subject: Add support for bulk ticket creation API
ticket.description: We need an API endpoint to create multiple tickets in a single request. Currently, we have to make individual API calls which is inefficient for our workflow.

ticket.subject: App freezes during report generation
ticket.description: When generating large reports with 10000+ rows, the application becomes completely unresponsive and must be force-closed.

ticket.subject: Lost access to account
ticket.description: My account suddenly became inaccessible. Getting 'Access Denied' error on login. No changes were made by me. Urgent assistance needed.

ticket.subject: Incorrect balance displayed
ticket.description: My account balance shows $500 but recent transactions don't add up. Some transactions appear to be missing from the history.

ticket.subject: Feature: Custom user roles
ticket.description: Need the ability to create custom user roles with specific permissions. Standard roles don't match our organizational structure.

ticket.subject: Search feature shows irrelevant results
ticket.description: Searching for 'payment' returns results for 'paper' and 'paycheck'. Search relevance is poor and needs improvement.

ticket.subject: Cannot invite team members
ticket.description: The invite team member functionality is not working. Email invitations are not being sent and no error message is displayed.

ticket.subject: Add webhook support for custom integrations
ticket.description: Would like webhook support so we can trigger actions in our systems when ticket status changes. This would improve our automation.

ticket.subject: Typos in email notifications
ticket.description: The notification emails contain several typos and grammatical errors. 'Update availble' should be 'Update available', etc.

ticket.subject: API response times degraded
ticket.description: API endpoints that normally respond in 200ms are taking 2-5 seconds. Started happening after the last deployment. Needs immediate investigation.

ticket.subject: Cannot download monthly invoice
ticket.description: Invoice download button doesn't work. Clicking it does nothing. Need this invoice for my records.

ticket.subject: Feature: Notification preferences
ticket.description: Allow users to customize which notifications they receive and their frequency. Currently getting too many emails.

ticket.subject: Unable to change password
ticket.description: The change password form doesn't accept any password I enter. Error message just says 'Invalid password'.

ticket.subject: Billing statement incomplete
ticket.description: This month's billing statement is missing transactions from the first week. Need a complete statement for accounting purposes.

ticket.subject: Mobile app lacks dark mode
ticket.description: The web version has dark mode but the mobile app doesn't. Would be appreciated to have feature parity.

ticket.subject: Cache not being cleared on updates
ticket.description: After updating information, old cached data is still being served. Have to do a hard refresh to see the changes.

ticket.subject: Feature: Advanced audit logging
ticket.description: Need more detailed audit logs showing who changed what and when. Current logs are too basic for compliance requirements.

ticket.subject: Browser session expires unexpectedly
ticket.description: Session expires even when actively using the application. Requires frequent re-authentication which is frustrating.

ticket.subject: Incomplete transaction record
ticket.description: One of my transactions shows amount as $0.00 in the transaction history although the payment was processed correctly.

ticket.subject: Add geolocation-based pricing
ticket.description: Would like support for location-based pricing. Show prices in local currency based on user location.

ticket.subject: Inconsistent behavior on iOS vs Android
ticket.description: Mobile app behaves differently on iOS and Android for the same operations. Form validation works on iOS but not Android.

ticket.subject: Feature: Email signature customization
ticket.description: Allow users to set custom email signatures for outgoing support emails. Currently all emails have the same generic signature.

ticket.subject: Export format compatibility issue
ticket.description: Exported CSV files cannot be opened in Excel on macOS. File encoding or delimiter issues suspected.

ticket.subject: Notification banner blocks important content
ticket.description: Notification banners at the top of the page don't auto-dismiss and block access to important buttons. Placement needs adjustment.

ticket.subject: Feature: Integration with CRM system
ticket.description: Need native integration with Salesforce or similar CRM to sync customer data and ticket information.

ticket.subject: Cannot filter tickets by date range
ticket.description: Date range filter is not working in the ticket list. Can filter by status and priority but not by date created or updated.

ticket.subject: API documentation link broken
ticket.description: The API documentation link on the help page returns 404. Need access to the API docs.

ticket.subject: Enable SSO for enterprise customers
ticket.description: Enterprise customers request the ability to set up single sign-on with their identity provider for easier access management.
